calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-24-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Farley Tolpen for and with Linda Peppars.

Mr. Tolpen submitted additional copies of deeds to the Court and noted that they were unable to locate the deed showing Ray's percentage of the property going to the living trust. In addition, Mr. Tolpen presented the Court with a rough breakdown regarding the discrepancy of the money to be distributed to the beneficiaries as set forth in the Examiner's notes. Furthermore, he stated that the real property will be distributed to the trust. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Jackie Alameda/Rosie Noguera.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-22-2008 Continued To Dec-24-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Farley Tolpen for and with Linda Peppars.

The matter was continued to December 24, 2008.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-08-2008 Continued To Dec-22-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Farley Tolpen for and with Linda Peppars (Petitioner).

The Court stated that the issue was whether or not the property would go through the estate or the trust and noted that the Court did not have a copy of the trust. Counsel clarified that the estate assets consisted of a sixty percent share in the property and that he would be amending the inventory. In addition, Mr. Tolpen stated that it was the siblings intent to give their share of the property to Linda Peppars and that it was a drafting error on his part. The Court instructed Counsel to file the corrected/amended Inventory, submit copies of all the deeds (except 9-11) from Raymond filing the notice of death of the joint tenant through May 30, 2008, and attach a copy of the Trust. The Court ordered all documentation to be filed by December 17, 2008 and continued the matter to December 22, 2008.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-24-2008 Continued To Dec-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Holt for Linda Peppars (Executor).

Ms. Holt stated that there was a waiver of accounting and the Court concurred. Ms. Holt presented argument to support her position, stated that three of the beneficiaries gave their interest to Ms. Peppars, and provided the Court with conformed copies of the waivers. The Court stated it would review the waivers and continued the matter to December 8, 2008 at 9:00 a.m. The Court requested that if Ms. Holt thought of anything further she could put it in writing.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Linda Forster, CSR#13286. Clerk: Jackie Alameda/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
